top_signals.title: Bitcoin rotations into altcoins collapse: Have altseasons 'disappeared'?
top_signals.summary: BTC's crypto market dominance is holding above a key support, signaling Bitcoin may keep absorbing capital from altcoins and delay a broader altseason.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
